creator: thedaemon@thedaemons.space
text:
Created attachment 245778
Xorg.0.log

After the pkg update the other day that removed FireFox, xorg no longer works with amdgpu driver. There is a segmentation fault, signal 11. This has been working fine. I use the drm-515-kmod drivers. I did manage to get scfb driver to work by specifying it. Let me know what other information you need.

AMD gpu Navi22 6750XT
FreeBSD 14.0-RC1 && 14.0-RC2
